be shortlived, indigent, unclean, without happiness, wife and
children. He will also be short of a limb.
1 have mentioned above that the Moon produces good or
bad yoga according to her position in the visible or invisible
half of the zodiac. Now another yoga similar to that but
more broad-based than that is given. That is called the Maha-
bhagya yoga. If the native is Male and time of biith Day all
the three viz. the Sun, Moon and the Lagna should be in odd
Rasis. In the case of a Female the time must be tiighr and the
three sigmficators must be posited in even Rasis. What are the
effects of this grand yoga ? They are : If it is a male, he will
give delight to all by his mere appearance, be munificent,
renewed, a king and pure, living for 80 years. A woman having
this yoga will enjoy plenty of wealth and long auspiciousness i.e.
will live long and predecease her husband, be of ideal character,
